creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Fri Feb  8 09:37:21 2013
New Revision: 311931
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/311931

Log:
  Robot Framework is a generic test automation framework for acceptance testing
  and acceptance test-driven development (ATDD). It has easy-to-use tabular test
  data syntax and utilizes the keyword-driven testing approach. Its testing
  capabilities can be extended by test libraries implemented either with Python
  or Java, and users can create new keywords from existing ones using the same
  syntax that is used for creating test cases.
  
  WWW: http://robotframework.org
  
  PR:		ports/175786
  Submitted by:	Vladimir Chukharev

Added:
  head/devel/py-robotframework/
  head/devel/py-robotframework/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-robotframework/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-robotframework/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-robotframework/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Fri Feb  8 09:36:08 2013	(r311930)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Fri Feb  8 09:37:21 2013	(r311931)
@@ -3601,6 +3601,7 @@
     SUBDIR += py-repoze.xmliter
     SUBDIR += py-resourcepackage
     SUBDIR += py-rlcompleter2
+    SUBDIR += py-robotframework
     SUBDIR += py-rope
     SUBDIR += py-roxlib
     SUBDIR += py-rtree

Added: head/devel/py-robotframework/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-robotframework/Makefile	Fri Feb  8 09:37:21 2013	(r311931)
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+# Created by: Vladimir Chukharev
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	robotframework
+PORTVERSION=	2.7.5
+CATEGORIES=	devel www python
+MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
+
+MAINTAINER=	Vladimir.Chukharev@gmail.ru
+COMMENT=	Robot Framework is a generic test automation framework
+
+LICENSE=	AL2
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}setuptools>=0.6c11:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-setuptools
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/py-robotframework/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-robotframework/distinfo	Fri Feb  8 09:37:21 2013	(r311931)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (robotframework-2.7.5.tar.gz) = b2df649eea2075b0df67d02a0b75bc24369cd405262d80e9a4d73f8fc64acd4b
+SIZE (robotframework-2.7.5.tar.gz) = 529541

Added: head/devel/py-robotframework/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-robotframework/pkg-descr	Fri Feb  8 09:37:21 2013	(r311931)
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+Robot Framework is a generic test automation framework for acceptance testing
+and acceptance test-driven development (ATDD). It has easy-to-use tabular test
+data syntax and utilizes the keyword-driven testing approach. Its testing
+capabilities can be extended by test libraries implemented either with Python
+or Java, and users can create new keywords from existing ones using the same
+syntax that is used for creating test cases.
+
+WWW: http://robotframework.org
